name: ip_dns_lookup
description: Look up DNS records, IP geolocation, and WHOIS-like information for a domain or IP address. Useful for server management, diagnosing DNS issues, checking domain configuration, or investigating network problems.

target.description: Domain name or IP address to look up

type.description: Type of lookup: 'dns' for DNS records, 'ip' for IP geolocation, 'all' for both (default 'all')
